artifacts.summary: Updated 10 documentation files with cross-platform install instructions for macOS, Debian/Ubuntu, and Arch/Manjaro

completion_data.completion_summary: Updated 10 documentation files to reflect cross-platform support: removed all macOS-only declarations, added Debian/Ubuntu and Arch/Manjaro package alternatives alongside every brew install command, documented Linux-specific features (PPM, uv curl installer, Typst via cargo/snap), and added a cross-platform package reference table to toolchain/README.md.
